creator: iblis.dif01@nctu.edu.tw
text:

└─[iblis@Arondight]% pkg info couchdb2        
couchdb2-2.3.0_2
Name           : couchdb2
Version        : 2.3.0_2
Installed on   : Fri Jan  4 19:47:39 2019 CST

Prefix         : /usr/local
...


└─[iblis@Arondight]% sudo service couchdb2 start
{"init terminating in do_boot",{load_failed,[error_handler]}}
init terminating in do_boot ({load_failed,[error_handler]})

Crash dump is being written to: erl_crash.dump...
